address_type.text: ประเภทที่อยู่

combo.address_type: 0=ที่อยู่ปัจจุบัน/1=ที่อยู่ตามทะเบียนบ้าน

root.sql:
select pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_edit_address.membership_no) as member_name, sc_mem_edit_address.membership_no, sc_mem_edit_address.operate_date, sc_mem_edit_address.entry_id, sc_mem_edit_address.address_type,
trim(sc_mem_edit_address.pre_address_no ||' '|| (CASE sc_mem_edit_address.pre_mooban WHEN null THEN null ELSE 'มบ.'||sc_mem_edit_address.pre_mooban END) ||' '|| (CASE sc_mem_edit_address.pre_moo WHEN null THEN null ELSE 'ม.'||sc_mem_edit_address.pre_moo END) ||' '|| (CASE sc_mem_edit_address.pre_soi WHEN null THEN null ELSE 'ซ.'||sc_mem_edit_address.pre_soi END) ||' '|| (CASE sc_mem_edit_address.pre_road WHEN null THEN null ELSE 'ถ.'||sc_mem_edit_address.pre_road END) ||' '|| (CASE sc_mem_edit_address.pre_tambol WHEN null THEN null ELSE (CASE sc_mem_edit_address.pre_province_code WHEN '010' THEN 'แขวง'||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_sub_district_name (sc_mem_edit_address.pre_tambol) ELSE 'ต.'||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_sub_district_name (sc_mem_edit_address.pre_tambol) END) END) ||' '|| (CASE sc_mem_edit_address.pre_district_code WHEN null THEN null ELSE (CASE sc_mem_edit_address.pre_province_code WHEN '010' THEN 'เขต'||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_district_name(sc_mem_edit_address.pre_province_code,sc_mem_edit_address.pre_district_code) ELSE 'อ.'||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_district_name(sc_mem_edit_address.pre_province_code,sc_mem_edit_address.pre_district_code) END)||' '|| (CASE sc_mem_edit_address.pre_province_code WHEN null THEN null ELSE 'จ.'||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_province_name(sc_mem_edit_address.pre_province_code) END) ||' '|| sc_mem_edit_address.pre_postcode||' '|| (CASE sc_mem_edit_address.pre_telephone WHEN null THEN null ELSE 'โทร.'||sc_mem_edit_address.pre_telephone END) END)) as old_address,
trim(sc_mem_edit_address.address_no ||' '|| (CASE sc_mem_edit_address.mooban WHEN null THEN null ELSE 'มบ'||sc_mem_edit_address.mooban END) ||' '|| (CASE sc_mem_edit_address.moo WHEN null THEN null ELSE 'ม.'||sc_mem_edit_address.moo END) ||' '|| (CASE sc_mem_edit_address.soi WHEN null THEN null ELSE 'ซ.'||sc_mem_edit_address.soi END) ||' '|| (CASE sc_mem_edit_address.road WHEN null THEN null ELSE 'ถ.'||sc_mem_edit_address.road END) ||' '|| (CASE sc_mem_edit_address.tambol WHEN null THEN null ELSE (CASE sc_mem_edit_address.province_code WHEN '010' THEN 'แขวง'||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_sub_district_name (sc_mem_edit_address.tambol) ELSE 'ต.'||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_sub_district_name (sc_mem_edit_address.tambol) END) END) ||' '|| (CASE sc_mem_edit_address.district_code WHEN null THEN null ELSE (CASE sc_mem_edit_address.province_code WHEN '010' THEN 'เขต'||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_district_name(sc_mem_edit_address.province_code,sc_mem_edit_address.district_code) ELSE 'อ.'||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_district_name(sc_mem_edit_address.province_code,sc_mem_edit_address.district_code) END)||' '|| (CASE sc_mem_edit_address.province_code WHEN null THEN null ELSE 'จ.'||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_province_name(sc_mem_edit_address.province_code) END) ||' '|| sc_mem_edit_address.postcode||' '|| (CASE sc_mem_edit_address.telephone WHEN null THEN null ELSE 'โทร.'||sc_mem_edit_address.telephone END) END)) as new_address
from sc_mem_edit_address where 1=1 --and sc_mem_edit_address.membership_no = '055793' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_edit_address.operate_date, sc_mem_edit_address.membership_no
